markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, publishing, and success metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Blocked:** The first article is blocked by internal review and a Webflow staging process issue. The goal is to publish by early next week to establish a content rhythm.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** Prophecy is now directly targeting Alteryx as its primary competitor, a move supported by Databricks because Prophecy drives higher platform usage.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [**Success Metrics Defined:** Success will be measured by a multi-faceted approach: organic traffic (SEO), LLM mentions (AEO/GEO), and content-driven conversions (demos, PLG signups).](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**GrowthX Action:** GrowthX will research topics that position Prophecy as a productivity layer for Databricks, aiming to capture AEO intent from users facing pipeline problems.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing & Process

  - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**Internal Review:** The first article is awaiting final review from Cody, then Raj and Will.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**Webflow Staging:** The publishing process is unclear, specifically how staging works and whether publishing a new article pushes all staged content live.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Goal:** Publish the first article by early next week to establish a consistent cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [2 articles submitted for review.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [3 articles in production.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [13 new topics proposed by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**Image Generation:** GrowthX's lab team is creating images based on existing prophecy.ai styles and the Figma file provided.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Defining Content Success Metrics

  - [**Objective:** Measure content performance across the funnel, from discovery to conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Metrics by Content Type:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [**Keyword-Focused (SEO):**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
          - [Organic site traffic (views, users, time on page).](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
          - [LLM mentions (AEO/GEO).](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Thought Leadership:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
          - [**Initial Hurdle:** Quality high enough for intentional distribution (social, nurture).](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
          - [**Nurture Performance:** Higher open/click-through rates are a strong positive signal.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
          - [**Social Performance:** Outperforming other content is a positive signal, but the algorithm is unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Conversions:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
          - [**Enterprise:** Track demo requests.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
          - [**PLG:** Track signups for the "RealForce" free plan (launching next month).](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**GrowthX Role:** Provide benchmarks and guidance on what constitutes "good" performance.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [**Prophecy Action:** Cody will meet with Will to clarify conversion goals and tracking capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Competitive & Partnership Strategy

  - [**Primary Competitor: Alteryx**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prophecy is deliberately re-engaging Alteryx head-to-head, a strategy with a proven track record.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [**Content Focus:** Highlight Alteryx's limitations (e.g., desktop vs. cloud) and position Prophecy as superior for analysts.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [**Key Partnership: Databricks**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Databricks prefers Prophecy over Alteryx because Prophecy drives higher platform usage.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [**Mechanism:** Prophecy enables analysts to solve engineering backlogs, increasing Databricks compute consumption.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
      - [**GrowthX Opportunity:** Research topics that position Prophecy as a productivity layer for Databricks, capturing AEO intent from users facing common pipeline problems.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)

### Prophecy's Internal Video Project

  - [**Project:** A 3–4 month sprint to create \>30 product demo videos for sales and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Resource constraints; technical teams have limited availability (e.g., 20 hours/month).](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [**GrowthX Opportunity:** Cody will provide the topic list for SEO input.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Finalize review of the first article.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Clarify the Webflow staging process and create a process doc.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [Meet with Will to define success metrics and conversion goals.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [Share the video topic list with GrowthX for SEO input.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
      - [Research topics positioning Prophecy as a productivity layer for Databricks.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
      - [Gain Google Analytics access for prophecy.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/zQPtLfUFEwq93eUpR_zUPHdZfW66sxju?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
